response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure at Stripe, including MCP frameworks, which aligns with key requirements; however, he lacks explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade GenAI systems, direct experience with vector databases or RAG architectures, and leadership in technical discovery sessions with enterprise stakeholders, which are critical for the staff-level role.
strengths: Experience with Model Context Protocol (MCP) and agentic workflows at Stripe
Proven full-stack proficiency in TypeScript/Node.js and cloud infrastructure (AWS CDK)
Strong open-source contributions and technical mentorship through workshops and tools
concerns: No clear demonstration of 8+ years in production-grade GenAI or AI system deployment
Missing explicit experience with vector databases, RAG, or multi-agent frameworks like LangGraph
Limited evidence of leading technical discovery sessions or enterprise customer-facing AI consulting
